subcodes.first_line: No harm lieth in what thou hast chosen as a means of livelihood, for the remembrance of the Wronged One is praiseworthy at all times and seasons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و لا بأس بما اتخذته وسیلة للمعاش لان ذکر المظلوم ممدوح فی کل وقت و اوان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry
